The song is about me living on my own for quite a while and the ups and downs of it all. Then meeting someone when you’re in a very rough spot. And that certain person — whether it’s a friend or a lover — shaking up your world and making the worst time actually the best time.

Title: Back for More!
About:
“Back for More” is a collaboration between South Korean boy group TOMORROW X TOGETHER and Brazilian popstar Anitta. The track is a disco pulsing anthem with a groovy baseline and playful whistling sounds, adorned with the vibrant hues of Brazilian funk.
The lyrics explore how enchanting miracles can be woven into the ordinary moments of our lives. The song was premiered at the 2023 Video Music Awards where the two artists took to the stage to perform the single.

Title: Love Lockdown!
About:
The fifth song in the groundbreaking album and its lead single. A song that was a drastic change in Kanye’s music, it was a sneak peek into Kanye’s influential album. It debuted in the 2008 MTV Video Music Awards.
In an NPR interview with Frannie Kelley and Ali Shaheed Muhammed, Saul WIlliams revealed that he helped write the song.
The song contains the main production elements present in all 808s and Heartbreak songs: Auto-Tune singing, electro pop influences and the use of the Roland TR-808 drum machine.
The song reached number 2 position in the Billboard Hot 100 and has sold over 3 million copies, so it’s one of Kanye’s best selling singles.

Title: Hawaiian Roller Coaster Ride!
Singer: Mark Keali’i Ho’omalu & Kamehameha Schools Children’s Chorus
About: After Nani fails to find work yet again due to Stitch’s poor behaviour, David comes by and suggests that they all go surfing and have some fun. Although Stitch is supposed to be afraid of water because he can’t swim, he finds that he loves surfing and is soon riding happily on Nani and Lilo’s surfboard.

Title: Swipe!
About:
Swipe on Cledoksen 30.5.2018 julkaiseman Boboff Tapen 5. kappale. Kappaleessa esiintyvät Cledoksen lisäksi Bizi, Mikael Gabriel, Gracias, TIPPA ja MD$, kuka myös tuotti kappaleen biitin.
Swipe julkaistiin yhtenä Boboff Tapen singlenä aiemmin samana vuonna.

Title: Blue Moon!
About: “Blue Moon” is a popular song written by Richard Rodgers and Lorenz Hart in 1934 originally. Frank Sinatra’s rendition of the song is first on his album titled “Sinatra’s Swingin' Session!!!” recorded in 1960 and published in 1961. Blue moon is the second track on this album along with 11 other songs. Blue moon is a song about desperation and loneliness being solved by one blue moon and its magic and ending with Frank finding his love. Being popularized in the hit game “Fallout: New Vegas” it has become one of Sinatra’s most well known songs up there with songs like “My way” and “Theme from New York, New York”.

Title: TWICE - Dance the Night Away (Romanized)!
About: chae had one line

Title: Like a Farmer (Remix)!
About:
In a satirical take on country music, Tracy and Uzi rap over a combination of acoustic guitar chords and trap drums in exaggerated white Southern accents. They put a twist on traditional rap themes of lean, hos, and fast whips and replace them with beer, whores, and tractors, making for a clever and catchy blend of two traditionally opposing genres.
This song, released only 10 days after its former, matched streaming numbers to that of its predecessor within a couple of days of its release.

Title: Another World
About:
“Another World” is the B-Side of One Direction’s single, “Gotta Be You”.
It was released as a bonus track in many different editions of the album Up All Night, being track 14 of the Italian and German editions and track 16 of the Australian, Mexican, Philippines and New Zealand souvenir editions and of the Japanese edition

Title: Girls Like You (Remix)!
About:
The existence of the remix of the original “Girls Like You” was initially confirmed in a tweet by the band:
Leaving the original vocals & production intact, Cardi adds a Bronx-flavored verse to the pop record, rapping about having danced for dollars & being the life of the party among other things.
The remix also gained its own music video featuring several idolized women across an array of fields.
In September 2018, the song topped the Billboard Hot 100, becoming Cardi’s third #1 single, and Maroon5’s fourth. The song dethroned the uber-popular “In My Feelings”, by Drake, which led the pack for ten weeks.
On February 11, 2019, “Girls Like You” logged its 33rd week in the top 10 on the Billboard Hot 100, becoming the sixth single in the chart’s history to stay in the top 10 for that long. The song currently matches Ed Sheeran’s 33-week run of “Shape of You” in the top 10.

Title: Peace and Love on the Planet Earth!
Singer: Zach Callison, Estelle, Deedee Magno Hall, Michaela Dietz & Shelby Rabara
About: “Peace and Love (On Planet Earth)” is a song that premiered in the episode “It Could’ve Been Great” during the 4th StevenBomb. In the show, the song is written by Steven and presented to Peridot as a way to try and get Peridot to realize the beauty of life on Earth, as it could be so complex and simple at the same time.

Title: Happy!
About:
Pharrell made the world “Happy” in 2014 with this feel-good anthem. The song soared to #1 in 35 countries—it was the best selling song of 2014.
Pharrell wrote and produced “Happy” for the soundtrack of Despicable Me 2—it also became the lead single of his second studio album, G I R L. The song appears in a scene in the film where the lead character Gru dances through streets with joy because he has fallen in love.
Pharrell told W Magazine that “Happy” came after he unsuccessfully pitched Despicable Me 2 producer Chris Meledandri on some other songs he’d written.
After nine different songs, recorded fully, they were like, ‘No, no, no, no.’ So I went back and wrote ‘Happy.’ I didn’t have the melody, just the chorus. For 20 minutes after I finished, I was jumping around the room. I told Chris to listen to the song in his car, that if he didn’t like ‘Happy,’ I didn’t know what to give him.
Originally, Pharrell intended Cee Lo Green to sing the song—but things didn’t work out. He told Howard Stern:
Cee Lo Green wanted to do it—and he did do it. He sounded amazing on it. He burns my version! The powers that be, at the time, did not see it fit for him. Some folks on his team just felt that the priority should be on his album at the time, so they elected not to do that song. It’s not his fault; he was totally down with it. He was one of the most gracious people about it when ‘Happy’ came out
“Happy” is repeated 56 times over the course of the song. 62% of the “Happy” is dedicated to its catchy chorus—about 20% more than the average pop song.
The first-ever 24-hour music video was made for “Happy”—it follows 400 different people enjoying life while they walk around LA.

Title: 다시 여기 바닷가 (Beach Again)!
About:
Born through a project by MBC’s variety program How Do You Play, “Beach Again” is the debut song of SSAK 3, a summer dance group consisting of members Lee Hyori (Linda G), Yoo Jae Suk (U-do-ragon), and RAIN (B-ryong).
The song reinterprets the sensibility of the 90’s in a modern style, adding to the perfection of the song with a cool sound of brass, groovy drums, and bass.

Title: Lip Gloss!
About:
“Lip Gloss” is the debut single from American hip hop recording artist Lil Mama. The song was released as the lead single from her debut album VYP: Voice of the Young People. The song became a hit in the United States, peaking at number ten on the Billboard Hot 100 chart.
A single mix of the song exists, where the breakdown is completely removed.

Title: Shake It Off!
About:
“Shake It Off” is an upbeat track that encourages listeners to let go of small problems. It spent four weeks at #1 on the Billboard Hot 100 song chart, staying on the chart for a consecutive fifty weeks, as well as beginning the 1989 era with a bang.
On August 18th 2014, Swift announced three surprises via a worldwide online stream for ABC News and Yahoo. The first surprise was the unveiling of “Shake It Off,” the second was the announcement of the 1989 album, and the third was the premiere of the song’s music video, which later won Favorite International Video at the 2015 Myx Music Awards.
As of 2019, the song has sold a total of 5.4 million copies in the United States.

Title: Touch My Body
About: “Touch My Body” topped the Billboard Hot 100 and gave Mariah the most number-one singles in U.S. history by a solo artist, surpassing Elvis Presley.

Title: Pretzel Logic!
About: Out of sync with the world’s changes, the track “Pretzel Logic” delves into the concept that some experiences can never be relived or recaptured. Its blend of nostalgia, a yearning for fame, and a sense of longing make it the titular track of the album.

Title: Red Velvet - 빨간맛 (Red Flavor) (Romanized)!
About: it is a fun cachy song that is upbeat and will make you dance

Title: New Kidz on the Block
About:
“New Kidz on the Block” by ZEROBASEONE is a co-promote song for their debut mini-album, YOUTH IN THE SHADE. This dynamic track showcases ZEROBASEONE’s unwavering determination to rise to the pinnacle of success. With its catchy UK pop dance sound and infectious 2-step garage rhythm, the song exudes a free-spirited vibe and undeniable swag.
The nine members of ZEROBASEONE come together in this song, pledging to become the “New Kidz.” who will revolutionize the monotonous grey streets and ascend to the highest heights. The groovy bassline, lively drums, and effortlessly addictive melody perfectly capture their vibrant energy and enthusiasm of youth.

Title: loving u!
About: This song is about Patrick expressing his loyalty and patience to one (Bennie?). The collaboration of atlas and purpan was released in July 2nd 2015 on Bandcamp and SoundCloud on the “windmills” EP.

Title: Alcohol-Free
About:
“Alcohol-Free” is a sleek, summery, and Bossa nova-infused track featuring TWICE’s smooth vocals. Lyrically, the song depicts how someone is drunk in love with their significant other and likens their special someone to various drinks from Champagne to Piña colada.
The music video of the song features a wide range of refreshing summer drinks. The members also perform their choreography on different cocktail glass-inspired stages.
Member Nayeon spoke on the song in a June 2021 premiere live session:
[The song is where] passionate Bossa nova meets the lively energy of TWICE. When it’s really hot, a nice choice of music can go a long way.
“Alcohol-Free” is the title track to the South Korean girl group’s 10th mini-album Taste of Love and their first release since May 2021’s Japanese EP Kura Kura.

Title: Home!
About:
This country folk song released in 2010 initially had modest commercial success on the US Billboard Alternative Songs chart, reaching number 25.
After fronting a Peugeot car commercial in 2013, it reached number 7 on the singles chart of France (compiled by Syndicat national de l'édition phonographique).

Title: Love Me Right!
About: Love Me Right is the first bonus track of the deluxe version of Chromatica, and addresses similar themes of self-love and catharsis found throughout the record.

Title: Really Really!
About:
Kevin Gates tells us how he’s really ‘bout that life. For those doubting and hating on him, Gates instinctively responds with one answer: “really really.”
“Really Really” is the fourth single from Gates' debut album, Islah. An official video was released in December 2015, and has amassed 175 million views as of December 2017.

Title: Cheer Up!
About: J Cole’s inspirational call to all the girls from fucked-up families.

Title: Young, Dumb, Stupid
About:
Start the new year with new feeling of NMIXX with lovely pre-release single “Young, Dumb, Stupid,” the first track of their first EP, “expérgo”.
Surprising released on March 13, 2023, one week before the official album releases. Talking about themselves who are just young and innocent to the world. They just gonna do whatever they want no matter what people sayin' about them. Add more young vibe with samples from the classics children’s song, “Frère Jacques” on the chorus part.
Confirmed by producer that JIWOO’s part, “두드려봐 knock-knock 문을 열어봐”, got the melody from classic Korean children playing, ‘Green Light, Red Light’, which was popular over the world last two years from Squid Game.
Also, they back again with the MIXXPOP genre, according to the producer team, THE HUB said this song is also MIXXPOP but not one genre to a completely different genre like their previous single, but mixed from children’s song with a hip-hop pop vibe, combined their unique vocal skill, which is a strong part of NMIXX.

Title: Cupid (Twin Version)!
About:
On “Cupid (Twin Version),” FIFTY FIFTY find themselves in a love situation as they think Cupid and the whole thing about love is nothing but a dumb lie, and yet they still wish for love in their life. The song gives the listener the perfect Valentine’s feel with a taste of light dance-pop.
The song is the “twin version” of “Cupid” due to being sung primarily by members Aran and Sio and the change of lyrics—which is that this song is an English version. The single blew up throughout social media for its catchiness and simplistic genre in just a matter of one month.

Title: Say My Name
About:
Betelgeuse (Alex Brightman) is trying to find some calmness on the roof and sees Lydia (Sophia Anne Caruso) about to jump off. To his surprise, Lydia can see and hear him even as a ghost, which sparks the devious plan depicted in this song, “Say My Name.”
The dilemma of this song boils down to Betelgeuse trying to convince Lydia to say his name but Lydia knows better than that, stating that she’ll think about his offer. Of course, this just sparks Betelgeuse’s interest and fighting spirit.

Title: Diced Pineapples!
About:
Perhaps the greatest title for a song ever, featuring MMG cohort Wale and OVO’s Drake. The song is produced by Cardiak.
Ross stated the concept of the song:
“When I got out of the hospital — you know, I had a seizure last year — when I was leaving, the doctor told me, ‘You gotta eat some more fruit, drink you some water, eat fruit and just relax for a little while.’ My fruit of choice was pineapples. For the next three weeks, I woke up every morning and ate diced pineapples, and I put the concept together. Drizzy came in, as well as Wale, and it’s kinda like, ‘She could be my diced pineapple. This special lady, she could be what I wake up to every morning and help me get by every day.”

Title: Bite Me
About:
Marking Avril Lavigne’s long-awaited return to the pop punk sound that initially made her famous, “Bite Me” is the first single off of her upcoming album Love Sux. The song features a star-studded cast of songwriters and producers including genre-bending EDM/pop producer Marshmello, blink-182 drummer Travis Barker, and Omer Fedi. It was released on November 10, 2021 and is her first single on Barker’s record label, DTA Records. The official music video was then released on November 12.
Regarding working on the song, Avril told Kevan Kenney of Audacy:
It’s a song about self worth and really just standing up for yourself and just being like, “You know what, you didn’t treat me right, you didn’t treat me well, and that doesn’t work for me. So baby, you can bite me.”

Title: Down in the DM!
About:
Memphis rapper Yo Gotti writes the playbook for flirting with women via Instagram’s Direct Message function (a.k.a. The DM). There’s celebrity nudes in his inbox, he’s got a keyboard full of eye emoji, and he’s ready to risk it all for his #WCW, Angela Simmons.
“Down In The DM” is a minimalist, bass-heavy, synth-and-808 hip-hop song that was produced by Florida-based musicians Ben Billions and Schife Karbeen. The lyrics, with their mix of sex and technology, follow in the tradition of Zapp’s “Computer Love,” Three 6 Mafia’s “2-Way Freak,” and Trey Songz’s “LOL :).”
The song was released on Gotti’s independent mixtape The Return in September 2015, and then released by Epic Records as a single on October 25, 2015. Rick Ross remixed “Down In The DM” on October 31 as part of his #RenzelRemixes series. Yo Gotti followed it up with his own remix on February 3rd, 2016, which featured a new verse from A-List rapper Nicki Minaj.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lOkBIx-2R1Y

Title: Look at Me Now!
About:
“Look at Me Now” is a braggadocious track featuring rap veterans Busta Rhymes and Lil Wayne and is Chris' first rap-centered single to be released. The track was released as the second single from Chris' fourth album, F.A.M.E..
The mid-tempo record features a modern sounding beat produced by Afrojack and Diplo and an extremely impressive verse by Busta, both of which has been praised by most of the hip-hop community and the reviewers.
“Look At Me Now” performed well in the charts, peaking at #1 on Billboard’s Hot R&B/Hip-Hop Songs, Hot Rap Songs and Rhythmic Songs charts, at #6 on the Top 100 chart.

Title: How You Like That
About:
“How You Like That” is the pre-release single from BLACKPINK’s first studio album. The song is their first solo release since Kill This Love in April of 2019.
The song is a hip-hop influenced, classic BLACKPINK song with grand and intense production featuring explosive beat drops. Through its lyrics, the girls of BLACKPINK wish to soar as high as possible even if they are flying in darkness.
The song heavily incorporates BLACKPINK’s styling with each member working with the stylists and the costume design team to create impactful imagery through the accompanying visuals for the song.
Their comeback with “How You Like That” was first teased by YG Entertainment weeks ahead of the song’s release. From June 14, 2020, teasers ranging from posters to a concept video were being uploaded daily to hype up the song’s release.

Title: Movie Star
About:
In “Movie Star,” Jack Harlow recruits the Virginia Beach native, Pharrell Williams for a bouncy track where the two artists rap about money, women, and designer brands.
A day prior to the release of the song, Jack Harlow posted an Instagram video of him and Pharrell where Pharrell said:
This is history. I love everything we did, but, this one here…

Title: RUN2U
About:
“RUN2U” is a caring anthem, where people think different of your relationship with somebody but you still choose to love them.
This track serves as the lead track of STAYC’s 2nd EP. YOUNG-LUV.COM. As an upbeat electronic-pop background plays, in detail the song is about showing your affection for somebody, not caring if others judge your relationship.

Song: LOVE DAY (2021) (바른연애 길잡이 X 양요섭, 정은지)
Title: LOVE DAY (2021)!
i hate u, i love u!
About:
Olivia O'Brien and Gnash pair up to create this conflicting love story. Gnash simply described the track as:
Missing someone sucks, but it’s important to feel.
This is not the only time that this duo have worked together. Gnash has produced some of Olivia’s tracks and it’s safe to say that there could be more from them in the future.

Title: Hold On, We’re Going Home!
About:
Drake’s single isn’t a rap song as we all know, but here’s the rapper-singer reiterating the fact for all us: Drizzy says him and Noah “40” Shebib “wanted to channelize the Michael Jackson-Quincy Jones sound with the song.”
SPIN describes the song as:
A dreamy, 100-BPM cut that nicely split the difference between synth-soaked R&B (think Tina Turner’s “What’s Love Got to Do with It”) and slow-motion deep house (Disclosure’s “Help Me Lose My Mind”).

Title: Stairway to Heaven!
About:
“Stairway to Heaven” is one of Led Zeppelin’s most famous recordings, with many considering it the greatest rock song of all time. It tells the story of a greedy woman who is overly optimistic about her unpromising future.
The song resonated with young listeners, opening up a door to a different realm of spirituality and transporting them into a more mystical view of life. The vagueness of the lyrics also allows listeners to interpret the song in their own way, adding to the magic and mystery of the track.

Title: NDA!
About:
On “NDA,” Billie details her struggles with fame, particularly the trials she has to face to keep romances under the radar by having those around her sign an NDA, or a Non-Disclosure Agreement. As the track progresses, Eilish can’t help but wish her life were different and didn’t require her to navigate the obstacles she faces.
The song also plays on the titles and theme of several other tracks on Happier Than Ever, including “Getting Older,” “I Didn’t Change My Number,” “my future,” and “Therefore I Am.”

Title: TAEYANG - 눈, 코, 입 (EYES, NOSE, LIPS) (Romanized)!
About: Taeyang wrote this song about his now wife, Min Hyo Rin, while they were dating. It talks about the struggles in a relationship, and now he reminisces about how beautiful her “eyes, nose and lips” were when they were dating.

Title: All Eyes on Me!
About:
“All Eyes On Me” is the eighteenth track on Bo Burnham’s fourth album, Inside (The Songs), compiled from his May 2021 Netflix special. This song is a sort of “encore” for the overall project, as it follows the climax of “Welcome to the Internet,” “Bezos II,” and “That Funny Feeling.” It also features Bo simulating a faux performance with pre-recorded audio of an audience cheering.
Throughout the piece, Burnham speaks directly to the viewer, addressing the pros and cons of being an entertainer, his desires to perform on stage again, receiving attention from his fans, and general feelings of futility.
On July 2, 2021, the track was re-released without the spoken word segment about his plans for 2020, which were interrupted by the COVID-19 pandemic. On July 10, 2021 “All Eyes On Me” peaked at #178 on Billboard’s Global 200’s chart—the first comedy song to do so. The song reached a new height of #119 on July 24, 2021.
On November 23, 2021, it was announced that “All Eyes On Me” was nominated for the 2022 Grammy Awards Show under the “Best Song Written For Visual Media” category. On April 3, 2022, Burnham finally took home the Grammy.

Title: Set Me Free!
About:
“Set Me Free” is the last track to Joshua Bassett’s second EP, Crisis / Secret / Set Me Free.
The song was first teased through a TikTok video posted on November 19, 2021. Later, Joshua teased the song again in another TikTok video published on December 1, 2021.

Title: Higher
About:
According to songwriter Bibi Bourelly, “Higher” was written in only 20 minutes. She spoke to Vice about the song:
Everything happens for a reason. Working with Rihanna has changed my life. The 20 minutes it took me to write “Higher” is actually what changed my life, because, even though we wrote “Bitch Better Have My Money” first, she heard that one first.
The intoxicating ANTI track first surfaced in March 2015 as a pair of Instagram previews posted by Rihanna while drunk on whiskey at 5:00 AM.
Rihanna compared the song to “a drunk voicemail” in Vogue’s April 2016 cover story:
You know he’s wrong, and then you get drunk and you’re like, ‘I could forgive him. I could call him. I could make up with him.’ Just, desperate.

Title: Blue Flame
About:
“Blue Flame” is the 3rd track of LE SSERAFIM’s debut mini-album “FEARLESS”. “Blue Flame” is bright and breezy song with a funky retro-pop baseline and dreamy cords. The lyrics compliment the melody as they talk about a desire that is as hot as a blue flame (which signifies the highest temperature a fire can reach).
The song first debuted on MCountdown, on May 5, 2022. “Blue Flame” did not enter the Gaon Digital Chart, but peaked at number 55 on the component Download Chart.

Title: NOT YOUR GIRL
About:
NOT YOUR GIRL, the eighth track, is an addictive band sound-based song with repetitive electric guitar riffs and chorus, and the lively and lovely IVE’s charm stands out.
Members GAEUL and REI participated in writing the rap lyrics for the song.

Title: ビッケブランカ (Vicke Blanka) - Black Rover (Romanized)!
About:
Black Clover opening 3. Episode 28 to episode 39. Part of Black Clover: Music Collection Vol. 2
Producer: Yamaike Junya (山池純矢) – Vickeblanka
Writer: Yamaike Junya (山池純矢) – Vickeblanka

Title: You Make My Dreams (Come True)!
About:
Hall & Oates’ inspirational anthem “You Make My Dreams” was the fourth and final single off the duo’s celebrated ninth studio album Voices and their fourth of eleven top 5 hits in the US, peaking at #5 in July 1981. The track continues to be popular, racking up more than one billion streams.
Hall wrote it in his NY apartment on a Yamaha CP 30 keyboard, which he described as “a very distinctive sounding electric piano”. Initially feeling its lyrics were “too happy” and perhaps needed to be more complicated, he eventually realized “it is what it is” and kept it simple. Oates later shared:
Its simplicity and directness is where the charm lies in that song.
The song has been featured in several popular films like The Wedding Singer and 500 Days Of Summer.

Title: Fearless!
About:
“Fearless” is a message to the youth of today to live your life without fear and to never measure your self-worth based on money or the opinion of others.
The title was revealed on January 2, 2020, when Louis replied to a fan on Twitter who asked for the title of the ninth track on the album.

Title: Switch Lanes!
About:
“Switch Lanes” is the final of three bonus tracks included on the deluxe version of Tyga’s Hotel California. The other deluxe tracks being “Dad’s Letter” and “Don’t Hate Tha Player”.
For “Switch Lanes”, Tyga teams up with The Game for a bar trading banger track. The Game also features on the Hotel California song “It Neva Rains”.
On March 2nd, 2013 the song received a music video.

Title: All Mine!
About:
Opening with church-like organ music, “All Mine” ironically deals with infidelity.
To “let the genie out of the bottle” means to allow something to happen that cannot then be stopped – like controlling one’s desires while in a committed relationship. Ye goes on to list several high profile celebrities who have been caught out cheating and speculates about their motives.
While this track was ultimately called “All Mine,” Ye Tweeted after the release of the song that it was initially going to be called “Medulla Oblongata” – the component of the brain partially responsible for regulating respiration and circulation. Reference to this can still be found in the lyrics.

Title: Back To You!
About:
“Back To You” is the second song to be released by Louis Tomlinson as a solo artist following the December 2016 release of “Just Hold On.” On the day this song dropped, Louis told Heat this song isn’t closely related to him, because the whole album is very personal so it was nice to take the pressure off with this song. He also said in the same interview that the song represents “the most extreme situation of that kind of relationship”.
On June 24 Louis hinted at the release of a single in a tweet. Later that day he announced the title and revealed that Bebe Rexha and Digital Farm Animals would be featured in the song in another tweet. Following this announced that it would be released at the end of July before confirming the rumored release date of July 21 and releasing the single art. Later he revealed a lyric from the song before sharing clips of the song on his Instagram story and on Twitter.
“Back to You” has been certified Gold in the UK and Platinum in the US.

Title: 섬찟 (Hypnosis)
About:
Hypnosis, the seventh track, is a song which has a unique sound intro that catches the ears from the beginning, expresses the moment of falling in love dreamily with the unique word “섬찟” with a combination of attack piano and thrilling guitar sound.
Members GAEUL and REI has participated in the song production by writing the rap lyrics.

Title: Kill Shit!
About:
Lil Herb & Lil Bibby team up for a street banger.
Download this heat here!
Official Video:
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V5y9AMeU1S8

Title: All of Me!
About:
“All of Me” is the third single from and sixth track on John Legend’s album Love in the Future (2013). Legend wrote it along with Toby Gad.
It has become one of Legend’s most popular songs, earning an 8x Platinum RIAA certification and appearing on top of 9 different countries' charts (including the US Billboard Hot 100).
Legend’s performance was nominated for Best Pop Solo Performance at the 2015 Grammys.
Legend has said in interviews that the song was inspired by his passionate love for model Chrissy Teigen, to whom he got engaged in 2011 and married in 2013.

On “1-800-273-8255,” Logic shows that suicide is never the answer to anyone’s problems. He wants people to know that there is always help available, such as the National Suicide Prevention Lifeline, whose phone number is the title of this song. Although 9-8-8 became the new phone number for the lifeline since 2022, the original phone number still continues to remain available. In fact, the song was released in partnership with the NSPL.
In an interview with Genius, Logic said that this song details the story of someone calling the NSPL wanting to commit suicide but after a conversation with the NSPL representative, the caller soon after decides he wants to live.
Logic teased the song various times on both Twitter and on Instagram stories as well.

Title: I Don’t Care!
About:
“I Don’t Care” is an upbeat collaboration between well-known pop artists Ed Sheeran and Justin Bieber.
Both singers use this track to describe being at a party, but wanting to leave due to feeling lonely or having social anxiety. That special someone by their side saves the day and makes them feel less alone in the end.
The duo had previously worked together on “Love Yourself”, the third single from Bieber’s 2015 album Purpose and Major Lazer’s 2016 smash cut, “Cold Water.”

Title: Cheshire
About:
In “CHESHIRE” ITZY lures their partner into trusting them and their playful tricks. Additionally, the song is the title track to their mini-album of the same name.
The song is an intense dark-yet-simplistic track that highlights the girls overpowering vocals.
For the music video, ITZY present all of their magical tricks to their partner in order to prove that they’re trustworthy.

Title: Devil by the Window (자정의 창가에서 만난 악마의 목소리는 달콤했다)!
About:
“Devil by the Window (자정의 창가에서 만난 악마의 목소리는 달콤했다)” is the opening track on TOMORROW X TOGETHER’s 5th mini album The Name Chapter: Temptation, released on January 27, 2023, alongside the album.
The fully English song introduces a “devil by the window” that tempts whoever it meets. In the context of the album’s concept, the devil by the window is possibly:
1. A representation of Neverland, where the boys are tempted to “postpone their growth and linger in [its] freedom”.
2. A creature that is aware of Neverland attempts to coax the boys into entering it by dreaming.

Title: Lunchbox Friends!
About:
“Lunchbox Friends” is the eighth track from Melanie Martinez’s sophomore album, K-12. In the track, Melanie details her aversity to fake friendships.
On May 17th, 2016, Melanie Martinez posted a photo on her Instagram with a caption of the song’s lyrics.
She released a snippet of the song on June 24th, 2019 through an interactive game, which contained the lyrics she had previously teased.
The artwork was made by pastelae, the same artist that made the artwork for “Detention,” “The Principal” and “Recess.”

Title: Roar!
About:
“Roar” is the lead single off Katy Perry’s fourth studio album Prism. The song deviates from the electro-pop sound on Teenage Dream in exchange for a mid-tempo pop-rock anthem similar to Sara Bareilles‘ “Brave.”
The song is a self-empowerment anthem that one critic described as a “stylistic return to the arena-sized singer-songwriter formula that made her debut One of the Boys so remarkable.”
The song was written by Dr. Luke and Perry’s longtime friend Bonnie McKee, both of whom co-wrote the singer’s other #1 hits “Teenage Dream,” “California Gurls,” and “Last Friday Night (T.G.I.F.)”.

Title: Take a Step Back!
About:
“Take A Step Back,” a pivotal track in the distorted trap trend. Notable for its distorted 808s and vocals, staples of X and Ski’s early careers. This is one of the most popular collaborations between the pair.
This song was originally released May 15, 2016 and was later put on Ski’s “You Will Regret” mixtape; released on June 30, 2017.

Title: BEAUTIFUL MONSTER
About:
“BEAUTIFUL MONSTER” is the title track off of STAYC’s third single album, WE NEED LOVE.
The song explores a relationship that’s hurtful but also sweet. STAYC showcase their mature attitude in an electronic-pop song.
The official music video flows like an adventure through fantasy-like and nature-aesthetic scenes near their house in the middle of the woods. Aditionally, it gained over 26 million views on YouTube, just in four days after its release.

Title: Pull Up!
About: this song was abt his gf arianna flecter but they are no longer together.

Title: Beautiful Liar
About:
“Beautiful Liar” marks the first collaboration between Colombian singer Shakira and American singer Beyoncé. The song is influenced by a mix of Shakira’s Latin and Middle Eastern sounds with Beyoncé’s contemporary hip hop and R&B sound.
Lyrically, the song deals with two women who discover they have been cheated on by the same man and instead of wasting their time on him, they agree that he is not worth fighting over.

Title: Queendom
About:
“Queendom” is the lead single from Aurora’s second EP, Infections of a Different Kind (Step 1), which was released as the first part of a two-part album.
The song was first played live in Salvador, Brazil during her “All My Demons Tour” at the country (October, 2017) and officially announced on April 11st.

Title: 열이 올라요 (Heart Burn)!
About:
“열이 올라요 (Heart Burn)” burns the listener’s heart away and it serves as the title track off of SUNMI’s summer single album of the same name.
In “열이 올라요 (Heart Burn),” SUNMI explains that every time she’s near her lover, her heart burns ‘cause of the loving relationship they have, and unlike her other songs, this time the singer puts her trust in them and gives them a chance.
The music video’s timeline surprisingly goes back the late 1800s and early 1900s, telling the story about SUNMI having relationships and using her love language towards another main character, her husband, until everything goes wrong. The cycle continues for various decades in a variety of countries with all of her other partners.

And remixed VERY quickly. Surely, “SpotEmGottem” will be mainstream like many other rappers, As long as he doesn’t get any criminal charges. Or it could boost his career, But I don’t influence it.

Title: Stamp On It
About:
Kicking off the new year, here comes GOT the beat once again with the flashy and catchy single, “Stamp On It.” The song also serves as the title track to its album of the same name.
“Stamp On It” consists of a unique hip-pop dance beat while lyrically the girls challenge their component in a competition and boast off about their unstoppable confidence.

Title: Backdoor!
About:
Lil Durk returns to the music scene with “Backdoor,” a surprise and his first release after a hiatus for about one-and-a-half months, due to the death of his longtime friend and fellow labelmate, King Von, on November 6, 2020. It is mainly a tribute to him. It also serves as the third single to The Voice.
On this song, the Chicago rapper talks about the struggles that he faced during his upbringing. Continuing his usual talk about troubles in the streets, he expresses his paranoia in life and his concern for legal troubles that happen around him.
This song was released concurrently with the official music video on December 21, 2020.

Title: OOOUUU!
About: “OOOUUU” is a cloudy club banger from buzzing Brooklyn rapper Young M.A. The spacey production from U-Dubb allows M.A to showcase her skills—dropping witty punchlines as she flows smoothly from line to line.

Title: BTS - 둘! 셋! (그래도 좋은 날이 더 많기를) [2! 3! (Still Wishing For More Good Days)] (English Translation)!
About: This is an amazing fan song from BTS to their ARMY. It talks about how everything will get better, but not without some hardships along the way too. They don’t tell tell you that everything will be perfect now as they know it is not true and don’t want to lie. They are telling ARMYs to forget about their worries, struggles, and sadness and to count to three and be free from it. This is also a song about how thankful they are for ARMYs that stayed by their side and always supported and love them.

Title: Birthday Song!
About:
2 Chainz drops off another hot single featuring G.O.O.D. Music frontman Kanye West, who co-produced the track with Sonny Digital.
During a interview with Fuse, 2 Chainz shared the origin of the song and that the artwork for both the song and his debut studio album, Based on a T.R.U. Story, were designed by West’s creative agency, Donda.

Title: 버퍼링 (Glitch Mode)
About:
“버퍼링 (Glitch Mode)” is the title track of NCT DREAM’s 2nd Album “Glitch Mode”. The single is an arcarde-esque hip-hop dance song with a mix of a dynamic 808 bass.
The lyrics express the idea of freezing, as if buffering, in front of the person they like. There’s a common use of electronics-related language throughout the song: “Miscode”, “버퍼링 (Buffering)”, “Glitch Mode” and “Clickbait”, are all used to represent a ‘fault’ in the singer’s system as they dysfunction at the thought of the person in their heart.

Title: aespa - Black Mamba (Romanized)!
About:
After Releasing a video trailer with all four members on November 2, the agency announced that aespa will release their debut single “Black Mamba” on November 17. The music video teaser was released on November 15, and the song officially premiered on November 17.
The lyrics are about a being called “Black Mamba” that not only interferes with the members' and avatar’s connection but also threatens their world and as such is abhorred by the members.
The song’s music video achieved the highest number of views for a K-pop group’s debut video, with 21.4 million views in 24 hours. Aespa promoted the song with televised live performances on various South Korean music programs including Show! Music Core, Music Bank and Inkigayo.

Title: Wannabe!
About:
“Wannabe” is a hit song by the British pop group Spice Girls. It was a single from their debut album Spice, released in 1996. The girls wrote the song with the help of Richard Stannard and Matt Rowe, who the band met at an industry showcase.
In Wannabe: How the Spice Girls Reinvented Pop Fame, Rowe remembers the impression they left on him that day:
I loved them. Immediately. The studio was pretty small, and they all sat on one chair on each other’s laps in a line. I don’t know how they managed it…They were like no one I’d met before, really.
The song was written and recorded quickly. Victoria missed the writing session for the track, though tried to pitch in over the phone. The song’s divvied up among the girls equally, except for Victoria, who contributed only backing vocals to the track. She regretted missing out. In her 2004 autobiography Learning to Fly, she recalled:
I just couldn’t bear not being there. Because whatever they said about how it didn’t matter, it did matter.
The label did not like the first outcome of the song, and got producer Dave Way to give the track an R&B influenced backing track. The group didn’t think this was the right vibe, and eventually sent it to be mixed by Mark Stent. This became the final version of the song.
Their label, Virgin Records, wanted “Say You’ll Be There” to be the band’s debut single, however the group fought for this song. Eventually got their way.
“Wannabe” lyrics addresses the value of female friendship over a female-male bond. It soon after became an iconic symbol of female empowerment and one of the group’s most popular songs.

Title: Way Back Home (Sam Feldt Edit)!
About: Way Back Home is a song by South Korean singer SHAUN. The track was originally released on June 27, 2018 as part of his second extended play Take. The remix by Dutch DJ Sam Feldt, released on December 21, 2018, features vocals from English singer-songwriter Conor Maynard.

Title: BTS - 내 방을 여행하는 법 (Fly To My Room) (English Translation)!
About:
“내 방을 여행하는 법 (Fly To My Room)” is a sub-unit track featuring SUGA, j-hope, Jimin and V.
The song speaks about the frustrating experience of stay-at-home orders and quarantine forced by the global COVID-19 pandemic. BTS had planned for a World Tour when they were forced to stay at home with one another. Though they missed meeting with their fans, collectively known as ARMY, and traveling elsewhere, their bonds with one another deepened which was fulfilling in and of itself.

Title: Love Story!
About:
Taylor was inspired to write “Love Story” when she was going through a difficult situation with a boy she liked, whom she wasn’t “officially” dating. The song has been rumored to be about two singers – the first being Joe Jonas, since it was recorded in March of 2008, just a few months before she began actually dating him. Other songs such as “Forever & Always” and “Last Kiss” are more explicitly about him.
The second rumored subject of the song is Boys Like Girls front-man, Martin Johnson whom Swift had a brief fling with in 2008 and collaborated with to pen the band’s track “Two is Better Than One” and Taylor’s song “If This Was a Movie”. This is a fitting match for the “star-crossed lovers” theme of the song as sources claimed that although the pair were into each other, Taylor’s publicists felt he was not a good match for her “American sweetheart” image – with him being a punk rocker who was going through personal issues at the time.
She chose to portray the story of Romeo and Juliet in the song, because she felt like she could relate.
I used to be in high school where you see [a boyfriend] every day. Then I was in a situation where it wasn’t so easy for me, and I wrote this song because I could relate to the whole Romeo and Juliet thing.
The lyrics talk about disapproval against the relationship, and her desire to go somewhere far away with him, and escape the people who look down on them.
“Love Story” peaked at #1 on Billboard’s Hot Country Songs, and at #5 on the Billboard Hot 100, just weeks after its release.
The song’s music video was described as timeless, by Swift.
‘Love Story’’s plot was a timeless scenario: I think it could happen in the 1700s, the 1800s, or 2008
The video won the CMT Music Awards for “Video of the Year,” as well as “Female Video of the Year.”
In February 2021, “Love Story” became the first official re-release from Taylor’s backcatalog following contractual disputes with Scooter Braun. It marked the beginning of a new chapter in her career as she sought autonomy and freedom from what she perceived as a manipulative business relationship.

Title: Tomboy!
About:
“Tomboy,” is the second track of Princess Nokia’s 2017 album 1992 Deluxe. The song is about Princess Nokia being proud of her body and owning her sexuality. In an interview with Mass appeal Princess Nokia talked about Tomboy and said,
By falling in love with all your flaws. I’ve done fallen in love with all of mine. I see my existence as a big fuck you to conventionality. Sure I have little titties and a phat belly, but that doesn’t make me less of a goddess, less of an aphrodisiac.

Song: 뜨거운 여름밤은 가고 남은 건 볼품없지만
Title: 뜨거운 여름밤은 가고 남은 건 볼품없지만 (Summer)!
가을밤에 든 생각 (A Thought on an Autumn Night)!
Shape of You!
About:
Ed Sheeran released “Shape of You” together with “Castle On The Hill.” The two songs were the first releases from his third album, ÷ (Divide), following in the mathematical footsteps of his + (Plus) and x (Multiply) albums.
“Shape Of You” is based around a tropical house-inspired lead melody and dancehall beat. A rhythm is given by xylophones, guitars, and percussions. The style and rhythm have been noted as close to the Sia successes, “Cheap Thrills”, which has caused some controversy. Ed has denied receiving inspiration from the track. Just like “Cheap Thrills”, however, “Shape of You” was written with the intention of it being recorded by Rihanna, but Sheeran later decided to keep it for himself.
In the song, Sheeran sings about meeting someone at a bar and falling in love with her; a love distinct from those in much of his previous work as it’s more focused on the physical than the emotional.
Sheeran had teased the song through a tweet that he had posted on January 5, 2017. The video had a colon that would then merge into a human body, referencing the “body”-inspiration of the song.
As of August 29, 2017, “Shape Of You” set a Billboard record, spending 33 straight weeks in the Top 10 of the Hot 100 chart.
On September 22, 2017, the track became the most streamed song of all time on the Spotify plaform at 1.318 billion plays. Sheeran passed Drake who previously held the record with “One Dance.”
The song won a Grammy Best Pop Solo Performance at the 2018 Grammys held on January 28, 2018.
On January 24th, 2019, “Shape Of You” was certified Diamond by the RIAA, selling over ten million units.

Title: everything i wanted!
About:
“everything i wanted” sees Billie recalling a nightmare she experienced where she committed suicide and saw all her friends and fans turn their backs on her. The lyrics showcase Billie’s strong relationship with her brother FINNEAS, as he’s the one she goes to for support when dealing with these types of problems.
The song is Billie Eilish’s first single released after her debut album, WHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?. The song was announced on November 11, 2019 via Twitter and Instagram stories. It had also been previously teased via Twitter on November 5th, 2019. On November 12, 2019, one day before its release, Eilish teased a 12-second snippet of the track via Instagram. A year before the track’s release, an eight second instrumental clip of “everything i wanted” could be heard in the background of one of Eilish’s Instagram stories.
Billie Eilish’s song ‘Everything I Wanted’ encapsulates the theme of the dichotomy between dream fulfillment and internal struggle, reflecting on the complexities of achieving one’s desires juxtaposed with feelings of isolation, the pressure of expectations, and the profound need for genuine understanding and self-acceptance.

Title: 서툰 이별을 하려해 (Trying to say good-bye)!
좋다고 말해 (Tell Me You Love Me)!
About:
“좋다고 말해 (Tell Me You Like Me)” is about a girl’s plea for her boyfriend to accept as her girlfriend.
The lyrics to this Indie Pop-Rock single was written by vocalist Ahn Ji-Young; the melody was composed, arranged, and produced by close protégé and songwriter, Vanilla Man.
Originally meant as one of many preliminary title tracks, but in the end, “우주를 줄게 (Let The Universe)” was officially chosen as the title track instead per listeners at SHOFAR Music’s SECRET Music Appreciation Concert at July 31, 2016. The single was finally released digitally in December 21, 2016.

Title: BOL4 - 썸 탈꺼야 (Some) (English Translation)!
About: a girl is preparing for her confession of love, and it is described as some missions that she should pass through.

Title: Dynamite!
About:
“Dynamite” is an upbeat disco-pop song that sings of joy and confidence, bringing a new surge of ‘energy’ to reinvigorate the community during these difficult times. The song finds global superstars searching for happiness by doing again what they are best at—spreading joy to the world through music and performances.
It marks BTS‘ first song to be released completely in English as a lead artist. It is featured in the ad for Samsung’s Galaxy S20 FE series.

Title: 오늘 취하면 (WINE)!
About:
In her first chart-topping track, “Wine,” Suran reflects on the memories of a person’s past relationship in a glass of wine through emotional lyrics yet groovy rhythm. The South Korean indie singer worked together along BTS member Suga and Changmo to produce the trendy hip-hop, R&B track infused with electro pop and a futuristic base.
Through Korean media outlet, Sport Chosun, Suran thanked both Changmo and Suga for their participation in this track.
When I was working on some music by myself last year, I was having a hard time and I was feeling depressed. It was at that time that I started talking with Suga about music, and we ended up working together and that’s how ‘Wine’ was created. I’m grateful to him because I received a lot of strength and energy from working with him, and the song came out so well. And I’ve always been a fan of Changmo, so I was very happy when he agreed to feature on my track after listening to the song. I’m grateful to him for elevating the track to another level with his rapping. (Translation Source)

Title: 꿈속에서 놓친 너, 옅은 잠결에 흐르길 (Montage_)!
좋아해서 미안 (Sorry, I Love You)!
About:
“You like this friend of yours, but once you tell them about it, you are scared that you may not be friends anymore. It’s something everyone can relate to and I think that it’s something that
everyone has experienced at least once. Ultimately, I think it’s about how one isn’t able to confess their feelings, unable to express their feelings – that’s what the song tries to describe.
The lyrics describe something youthful yet something sad.”
This is the statement given about the song meaning by the songwriter himself.

Title: She Knows!
About:
Born Sinner’s third single features Dirty Projectors’ Amber Coffman (Cole had previously sampled her on his remix of Major Lazer’s “Get Free”), also heavily sampling the Cult’s track “Bad Things”.
A typical Cole narration, this track details his sexual exploits outside his relationship and how he suspects that his girlfriend knows he’s been unfaithful.

Title: 이렇게 좋아해 본 적이 없어요 (Never Loved This Way Before)!
그렇게 살아가는 것 (So life goes on)!
IZ*ONE - 환상동화 (Secret Story of the Swan) (Romanized)!
남이 될 수 있을까 (We Loved)!
About:
A break up song, this song is a collaborative track about the feelings of regret and lingering memories around the time of separation.
The song is a mellow acoustic ballad accompanied by guitar and sung with calming vocal harmonies. Told from two different point of views, the story of a typical break up comes through; the verses tell a story of fighting and loneliness, while the chorus and bridge express feelings of longing to turn back time to when the two were happy together.
Although Bolbbalgan4 is a fairly popular duo in South Korea due to their successful debut on Superstar K6, 20 Years of Age’s indie artist status classifies the song under the indie genre.
Arguably, the song didn’t show anything new in terms of sound, resembling Bolbbalgan4’s previous works, especially that of “X Song”. Regardless, the song quickly swept the Korean music charts with the release of it’s music video, achieving a certified all-kill by taking the number one spot on all real-time and daily charts.

Title: 나랑 아니면 (Who Do You Love)!
About:
Wistful and sentimental, affectionate yet singed with sadness, “나랑 아니면 (Who Do You Love)” is the Black Skirts' title single off of TEAM BABY. The lyrics convey two people in love, but their love seems to face an unspoken obstacle, perhaps an imminent ending.
The music video for the single features a vigilante couple, perhaps inspired by a literal interpretation of the lyrics “You’d die with me, you’d kill someone with me,” which appear in the outro. Desperate to escape a life of hardship, the video features a couple literally on the run from their crimes–and their past–driving to nowhere with no one else to rely on but each other.
Still from music video

Title: My Body’s Made of Crushed Little Stars!
About: In this rapid burst of punk rage, Mitski repeatedly juxtaposes existential ideas with the pedestrian concerns of life. This highlights the disconnect between the grand scope of her thoughts and the reality of what she needs to do to survive in society. The absurdity of this contrast makes her plead for the chance to be martyred as Jesus was. Rather than deal with the mundanities of living, she seeks to die in a manner that will imbue her life with meaning.

Title: Seasons!
About:
On “Seasons,” 6LACK and Khalid compare the four seasons of the year to the figurative seasons of love in their respective relationships.
This marks their second collaboration, following Khalid’s April 2018 single “OTW.” The two were first pictured in the studio together on March 19, 2017.

Title: ITZY - 달라달라 (DALLA DALLA) (Romanized)!
About:
“달라달라 (DALLA DALLA)” is the debut song to the South-Korean girlgroup ITZY. The lyrics reveal how you should love yourself and disregard other people’s perceptions on you. The song features an electropop genre and aims to bring forth a “girl crush” and “teen crush” image.
According to the news, the music video for the song scored over 13 million views in less than 24 hours on Youtube, being the most debut for a k-pop girlgroup, breaking the I*ZONE’s La Vie En Rose record.
According to Soompi, on February 13, the song had grabbed No. 1 on the realtime charts of major music sites including Genie, Bugs, Mnet, and Soribada! It took No. 2 on Melon and No. 3 on Naver.

Title: BOL4 - 별 보러 갈래? (Stars over me) (Romanized)!
나비와 고양이 (Leo)!
About:
“나비와 고양이 (Leo)” is a double-title pre-release single released on May 7, featuring EXO’s Baekhyun. “나비와 고양이” literally translates to “Butterfly and Cat”. The track serves as a double title-track along with “Hug” for the mini-album Puberty Book II. The title “Leo” is named after Ahn Jiyoung’s cat, Galileo. The duet expresses the euphoric feelings of seeing a loved one and draws parallel between their beauty and wonder to that of a butterfly.
This is the first release by BOL4 since the departure of Woo Ji Yoon from the duo in April, their last release together being Two Five in September 2019.

Title: Young K (DAY6) - 그대로 와 줘요 (come as you are) (English Translation)!
Wifey!
About:
Wifey is the third single by American R&B, hip-hop artist and rapper Qveen Herby. It was the second single to her second EP: EP 2.
The song, released as of October 13th, 2017, follows in the same vein as her previous single “Love Myself”, as it was written about being confident and in love. In this case, however, Herby is telling her man that she’s a keeper.

Title: JISOO - 꽃 (FLOWER) (English Translation)!
About: “FLOWER” is the lead single in JISOO’s debut single album “ME”. The song is about “a woman who feels cheated and taken for granted in the relationship”. With the use of floral metaphor, the song is more about how happy the woman is after that broken relationship and she’s ready to “blossom”. “FLOWER” set a record of having the highest views in the music video of any K-Pop music videos in 2023 so far (as by 31 March, 2023).

Title: 졸업 (Graduation Song)!
About:
“Graduation Song (졸업)” is a pre-debut BTS j-hope, Jimin, and Jung Kook promo track released early 2013. It features the melody and instrumental from Snoop Dogg & Wiz Khalifa ft. Bruno Mars – Young, Wild and Free.
For this pre-debut task, the BTS members split into two groups – younger and older (minus V, who was a “Hidden Member” at the time. This song is the product of the younger half, while the older members RM, SUGA, and Jin released School of Tears (학교의눈물).

Song: 서울의 잠 못 이루는 밤 (Feat. 이수현)
Title: 서울의 잠 못 이루는 밤 (Sleepless in Seoul)!

Song: 우리 다투게 돼도 이것만 기억해 줄래 눈을 맞추고 서로가 서로의 손잡아 주며 낮은 목소리와 예쁜 말투로 상처 주지 않게 노력을 하고 ●
Title: 우리 다투게 돼도 이것만 기억해 줄래 눈을 맞추고 서로가 서로의 손잡아 주며 낮은 목소리와 예쁜 말투로 상처 주지 않게 노력을 하고 (Even if we fight, can you just remember this? Make eye contact, hold each other’s hands, and try not to hurt each other with a low voice and pretty tone) ●!

Song: Made In Christmas (feat. 이수현 of 악동뮤지션)
Title: Made in Christmas!
Goodbye My Lover!
About: The third single on the Back to Bedlam album, released in 2005. Tells a tale of losing a love. Back to Bedlam was the highest-selling album of 2005 in the UK, with over 2.4 million copies sold.By December 2009, the album had been certified 10× Platinum.

Title: Cat & Dog (English Version)!
About:
Cat & Dog (English ver.) is TOMORROW X TOGETHER’s special gift for fans around the world.
The song is an English version of the lyrics of “Cat & Dog”, a song of THE DREAM CHAPTER: STAR, TXT’s debut album.
This song expresses the desire to stay together for 24 hours in a relationship with a person, reminiscent of the relationship between a cat or dog and their owner.
The song features a marimba melody and a trap rhythm is added to create a cute atmosphere.
In an interview, TXT’s members talked about the love they received worldwide for their English version of Cat & Dog:
We were surprised to hear this version of the song. In return for our fans' support and hope that we could understand and enjoy our songs more easily. We want this song to be a special gift.

Title: 비행운 (Contrail)!
About:
From the album “Life Is Beauty Full EP” by MoonMoon or Kim Young-Shin, a K-Indie artist who debuted in 2016.
“Contrail” is the song that raised Moonmoon’s popularity exponentially.

Title: 꿈과 책과 힘과 벽 (Dreams, Books, Power and Walls)!
Hello!
About:
Almost five years after her groundbreaking 21, Adele examines the past and tries to right her wrongs on “Hello.” On the surface, the song appears to be about a break-up from long ago, but the song can also be interpreted as Adele’s attempt at reconciliation with her former self. In a tweet, Adele called 21 a “break-up record” and 25 a “make-up record.”
Adele revealed the broad inspiration for the song:
No, it’s not about anyone specifically. It’s about friends, ex-boyfriends, it’s about myself, it’s about my family. It’s also about my fans as well.
A day before the release, Zane Lowe interviewed Adele about her future goals, touring, the album, and the “Hello” music video. Although “Hello” was released on October 23, 2015, a portion of the song was first featured during a commercial break on the UK’s X Factor on October 18, 2015.
The accompanying music video broke the Vevo record for the most views in 24 hours with 27.7 million total. Taylor Swift previously held the record with her video for “Bad Blood”, which had 20.1 million views in a single day. “Hello” was directed by Xavier Dolan and was the first music video to be shot by IMAX cameras.
In the US, “Hello” debuted at number 1 on the Hot 100, selling a whopping 1,112,000 downloads in its first week, almost doubling Flo Rida’s previous sales record (636,000 with “Right Round”.) The track significantly broke various streaming records after being replayed 61 million times in its first week.
In an interview with i-D, Adele contextualizes “Hello”:
The song is about hurting someone’s feelings but it’s also about trying to stay in touch with myself, which sometimes can be a little bit hard to do,“ she explains. "It’s about a yearning for the other side of me. When I’m away, I really, really miss my life at home. The way that I feel when I’m not in England, is…” (she pauses) “desperation. I can’t breathe anywhere else.” Why? “I dunno. I’m so attached to my whole life here. I get worked up that I’m missing out on things. So ‘Hello’ is about wanting to be at home and wanting to reach out to everyone I’ve ever hurt – including myself – and apologize for it.

Title: PILLOWTALK!
About:
The debut solo release from former One Direction-er Zayn Malik, “PILLOWTALK” gets “dirty and raw” about sex—Malik explained to The Sunday Times:
Everybody has sex, and it’s something people want to hear about. It’s part of everybody’s life, a very BIG part of life! And you don’t want to sweep it under the carpet. It has to be talked about.
Malik’s lyrics focus on both the spiritual and physical elements of sex: the pleasure and the pain, the purity and rawness, “our paradise and our war zone.”
Going solo frees Malik from the restraints of a made-on-TV ensemble like One Direction:
I’m enjoying what I’m doing. I’m not censoring myself anymore, so I’m not tired. I love it.
“PILLOWTALK” premiered on January 29, 2016, the day after an interview with Beats 1’s Zane Lowe during which he previewed the song and other tracks on his debut solo album Mind Of Mine. It later debuted at #1 on the Billboard Hot 100.

Title: Pony!
About:
“Pony” is Ginuwine’s debut single, released 3 months prior to his debut LP Ginuwine… the Bachelor in August 1996. The song was a huge commercial and critical success and is considered as one of the greatest R&B songs.
It was also an important record for producer Timbaland as it became his first successful foray into R&B production, a genre he would have further success in with the likes of Aaliyah, Brandy and Justin Timberlake.

Title: RM - seoul (English Translation)!
About:
“Seoul” is the second track from RM’s second mixtape, mono.
With a relaxed backing instrumental, RM displays the wordplay of Seoul, the city he currently lives in, and the word “soul.” He expresses his bittersweet relationship with the metropolitan city. Throughout the lyrics, he challenges how genuine a place built of concrete and systematic mindsets can be.

Title: November Rain
About:
This piano ballad grand masterpiece became the signature song and the centerpiece of their simultaneous twin double album releases Use Your Illusion I and Use Your Illusion II.
Clocking in at almost 9 minutes, “November Rain” features Rose’s desperate vocal and heartfelt piano. A depressing autumn tale of lost love, Slash’s inspired soaring guitar solos and the band’s dramatic dynamics over a crescendo of a swirling string section backed by a powerful choir make the song an instant classic.
The song had been a work-in-progress since 1983. Former GNR co-founder and guitarist Tracii Guns explained:
When we were doing that EP for L.A. Guns, like ‘83? He was playing “November Rain”—and it was called “November Rain”—you know, on piano. Way back then, it was the only thing he knew how to play, but it was his. He’d go, “Someday this song is gonna be really cool.” And I’d go, “It’s cool now.” “But it’s not done”, you know, he used to say. And, like, anytime we’d be at a hotel or anywhere, there’d be a piano; he’d just kinda play that music. And I’d go, “When are you gonna finish that already”, you know? And he’d go, “I don’t know what to do with it.”
The lyrics and video are based on a short story by Del James called “Without You” from a collection called The Language of Fear, which was brought back to market in 2008 after being out of print. The new version of the book contains an intro by Axl Rose, who wrote:
Del James has a personal knowledge of most of the situations he writes about, and has a love of the gutter from having been there.
James has also contributed lyrics to GNR songs The Garden" and “Yesterdays” and has directed several music videos.
“November Rain” hit #3 on the U.S. Billboard Hot 100, #9 in Germany where it charted for 51 weeks, #5 in Australia riding the Top 10 for 22 weeks and #7 in New Zealand ending 1992 as their second best-selling single.

Title: 미안해 널 사랑해서 (Sorry for loving you)!
Say Yes To Heaven!
About:
“Say Yes To Heaven” was arguably Lana Del Rey’s most popular unreleased song by 2023, gaining popularity since 2016.
The demand for an official release continued growing, gathering a large number of videos and views on social media apps such as TikTok and YouTube from leaks of the song. The demand was finally met in 2023, when the song had its long-awaited release.
It’s rumored that “Say Yes To Heaven” was first intended to be included on Ultraviolence, Del Rey’s third album, and recorded around 2013 along with other scrapped songs such as “Your Girl” and “Fine China.”
A snippet of the Ultraviolence version of “Say Yes To Heaven” first surfaced on the Internet in August 2016, just a few months before the complete song eventually leaked on December 24 through SoundCloud. Between 2017 and 2021, other versions of the song also appeared online, presumed to be outtakes from sessions for subsequent albums Honeymoon and Lust for Life.
In early 2023, reports of videos that featured the song being taken down due to copyright claims sparked discussion about an official release for “Say Yes To Heaven.” The speculation was later fueled weeks later when the song was found registered with a different length than that of leaks in PPL’s repertoire database.
On May 19, 2023, without any prior announcement, a fresh recording of “Say Yes To Heaven” was officially released to streaming services alongside a sped-up version of the song.

Title: Forgot About Dre!
About:
“Forgot About Dre” was released as the second single from Dr. Dre’s 2001 album, and it was his statement to anyone feeling like his production suffered after his escape from Death Row in 1996. During an interview with MTV, Dre spoke about the song’s concept:
‘Forgot About Dre’: The song is basically about the little period of time I went through in between records, and what people out in the street were saying about me, about, you know, how I fell off and how I couldn’t do it anymore, and all this nonsense. So this is just a response to that. That’s all it is. Period.
Eminem not only features on the track, he also wrote almost all of the lyrics, including the majority of Dre’s verses. This is rather obvious given the rapid flow, jam-packed with multisyllabic assonance—a marked departure from Dre’s usual style. Dre talked about how the song came together:
This is actually one of the few times where the lyrics were written before the track. Eminem actually wrote that. He came in and was like, ‘I got this song I wrote for you.’ So, we had the problem of trying to figure out what the track was gonna be to the lyrics, and it was a little bit difficult because I’m doing it that way. But we made it happen.
The single peaked at #25 on the US Billboard Hot 100 and #3 on the Rhythmic Top 40 charts, while also achieving platinum status in the United Kingdom. This track brought in a Grammy for Best Rap Performance By A Duo Or Group in 2001 and also won for Best Rap Video at the MTV Video Music Awards in 2000.

Title: 우리가 맞다는 대답을 할 거예요 (They’re Gonna Say We’re Right)!
마지막 첫사랑 (My First and Last)!
About:
“마지막 첫사랑 (My First and Last)” is a funk-infused up-tempo pop single from NCT DREAM’s 1st album of the same name.
The song shares a counterpart sung in Mandarin, which features the same choreography and backing track.
The audio and performance of this song were teased on Feb 7th leading up to the album release on the 9th.

Title: 가끔 연락하던 애 (Someone You Used To Know) (@kyulisme)!

Song: 나랑 같이 걸을래 (바른연애 길잡이 X 적재)
Title: 나랑 같이 걸을래 (Do you want to walk with me?)!
Let’s Go See the Stars (별 보러 가자)!
AKMU - 후라이의 꿈 (Fry’s Dream) (English Translation)!
About:
“Fry’s Dream” by AKMU is part of their 4th digital single album Love Lee. The song explores the theme of pursuing one’s dreams and following one’s own path in life.
The lyrics convey a message of not conforming to societal expectations or pressures, but rather embracing personal aspirations and individuality.
The song was written and produced in the key D Major, with a tempo of 125 BPM.

Title: 오랜 날 오랜 밤 (Last goodbye)!
About:
“Last Goodbye (오랜 날 오랜 밤, lit. A day, a night from a long time ago)” is the first single off of AKMU’s sophomore album ‘Winter’ – the third part of their seasonal music project.
The ballad song, sampling ‘Canon in D’, brings you to a warm feeling of love in cold winter days.
The M/V was released on January 3, 2017, alongside with the album and the short film ‘Spring of Winter’. The film tells the story of AKMU being disbanded after a fight, as the siblings try to find love on a winter day in Japan.

Title: Swan Song
About:
“Swan Song” appears at the end of Lana Del Rey’s fourth studio album, Honeymoon. Its title and placement towards the end of the tracklist sparked fears of an announcement of retirement because the song references the legend of the swan song. It is widely said that a swan only sings once in its life, very beautifully, before it dies.
At face value, “Swan Song” is about a couple who have worked hard all their lives, and now are ready for retirement. On a deeper plane, it could also be considered Del Rey’s inner monologue between the depressed rational ‘you’ and the suicidal temptress ‘I’.
A portion of the lyrics were revealed on August 20th when the Honeymoon Box Set became available for pre-order.
The artwork was posted by Urban Outfitters on Twitter:

Title: You Give Love a Bad Name!
About:
Songwriter Desmond Child had written the song “If You Were a Woman (And I Was a Man)” for Bonnie Tyler, but was unsatisfied with its chart performance. So he brought the music to Bon Jovi and they rewrote it as “You Give Love A Bad Name”.
It was released as the first single from the album Slippery When Wet and became Bon Jovi’s first of four #1 hits on the Billboard Hot 100. It was also a top 30 hit in several countries overseas including the UK.
In 2009, “You Give Love A Bad Name” was named the 20th greatest hard rock song of all time by VH1.

Title: If You Want Love!
About:
On “If You Want Love,” NF talks about the essentials of love, and how it takes going through the struggles and hardships in life and willingness to learn change to gain a sense of true love for yourself and from the people around you.
NF has touched base with what revolves around love before. In fact, this is similar to an older song, “Thing Called Love.” The slow-paced ballad, guitar chords and harmonizing in the background give off a relaxed vibe.

Title: Somebody That I Used To Know!
About: Having burned through the Australian charts late in 2011, Gotye’s sad tale of lost love continued to climb the charts on US soil in 2012 and 2013. The emotionally charged “Somebody That I Used To Know” details a mutually ended relationship in which one person feels a pain that the other refuses to feel.

Title: 사라진 모든 것들에게 (For the gone)!
Singer: Choi Jung Hoon, CODE KUNST & Simon Dominic

Title: Stay With Me!
About:
“Stay with Me” sees Smith yearning for a lasting relationship after a one-night stand leaves them craving more. One of their biggest hits, it’s gone #1 in countries like the United States, Canada, and Ireland, and even won two Grammy awards.
Written with Jimmy Napes and Tourist in Old Street, London studio, Smith claimed “the song just flowed out of us so naturally.” When Tourist played the first three chords, Napes quickly added a drum layer, and the rest of the track took only 30-40 minutes to write.
Upon the track’s release, listeners noticed similarities between “Stay With Me” and Tom Petty’s 1989 hit “I Won’t Back Down.” Smith’s team said that this was purely coincidental, but agreed to give Petty co-writer credits, and Petty stated that he has no ill feelings for Smith.
The music video was directed by Jamie Thraves, who also directed the music videos for Smith’s “Money On My Mind,” Radiohead’s “Just,” Coldplay’s “The Scientist,” by and Death Cab for Cutie’s “I Will Follow You into the Dark.” It features Sam walking down the street in Hackney, London, among other settings.

Title: L’Amour, Les Baguettes, Paris
About:
The song “L’Amour, Les Baguettes, Paris” by Stella Jang reflects on the memories and emotions associated with a lost love in the city of Paris. The lyrics express a sense of nostalgia and longing for someone who is no longer in the author’s life.
The phrase “L'amour, les baguettes, Paris” symbolizes the romantic and cultural aspects of the city, which becomes intertwined with the memories of the relationship.
The lyrics continue to emphasize the significance of the lost person, mentioning how others see the lights, glitz, and festivities of Paris, but for the speaker, it is the memory of the person that comes to mind.
Overall, “L’Amour, Les Baguettes, Paris” conveys the bittersweet nostalgia associated with lost love and the lasting impressions it leaves behind, intertwining personal memories with the romantic allure of the city of Paris.
(Bio Referenced From songtell)

Title: 내 마음 들리나요 (Can You Hear My Heart)!
BTS - 바다 (Sea) (English Translation)!
About:
“바다 (Sea)” is the second hidden track on BTS' fifth mini album, Love Yourself 承 ‘Her’ and is only available on the physical album. It discusses the hardships BTS has experienced since debut, particularly struggling to compete with groups from other, larger agencies. In this song, BTS reflects on these hardships, fearing that their global fame and success could leave as suddenly as it arrived.
This song was composed by RM in October 2016 and was originally considered for his next mixtape. Parts of the song were altered when it was changed to be a BTS release, but RM played a clip of the original version during his behind-the-scenes- vlive (at 38:50).
Bio copied/pasted from the original lyrics

Title: 너무 아픈 사랑은 사랑이 아니었음을 (It’s Not Love If It Hurts Too Much)!
МАМБЛ (MUMBLE)!
About:
24 июня 2018 года Фладда опубликовал тизер клипа в своём Инстаграме.
А 25 июня 2018-го уже вышел сам клип, режиссёром которого стал Рустам Курташкин.
Спустя короткий промежуток времени после выпуска микстейпа Прилунение GONE.Fludd опубликовал ещё одну композицию — по звучанию она сильно отличается.
За бит ответственен Toreno.

Title: 여름비 (SUMMER RAIN)!
About: SUMMER RAIN is the third track on GFRIEND album Rainbow which combines “Dichterliebe, Op. 48:1” by Robert Schumann with new jack swing beats and twinkling synths.

Title: Happy Song
About:
On July 5, 2015, Bring Me The Horizon started a mystery online campaign. The image of a white umbrella on a black background took over their social media and official website, causing fans to wonder whether new music was to be released soon. On July 12, the official audio for “Happy Song” was released on Youtube.
“Happy Song” shows the band moving in the same musical direction that surprised many fans with their 2014 single “Drown.” There is more of an emphasis on melody and production than the heavy metalcore riffs and breakdowns of previous BMTH music. Talking to Gigwise after their mammoth Wembley show in December 2014, Oli said the new album would have them pushing themselves further, writing different songs to those of ten years ago.
Happiness doesn’t sell that well… pain’s better to listen to
Oli also told Billboard Magazine:
“Happy Song” is a sarcastic open letter to the world about how we use superficial and trivial things to ignore the real problems.

Title: 1:31AM (잘 지내야해)!
About:
“1:31AM (잘 지내야해)” is the fourth track of GOT7’s repackaged album “Present: YOU & ME”. Originally premiering on April 29th, 2016 at GOT7’s opening night of “Fly in Seoul” as a special unit stage (part of the concert setlist for the tour), this song was both written and performed by members JB and Youngjae.
With emotional vocals and sweet yet sad lyrics, the two members sing about the aftermath of an ended relationship and the feelings that come with it.

Title: Only!
About:
On “Only,” the third single from The Pinkprint album, Nicki Minaj plays with her dominance over her male Young Money labelmates and asserts her sexual and rap prowess. Producers Dr. Luke and Cirkut provided the stripped-down beat, and duo R. City helped write the track.
“Only” marks the first time the Young Money figureheads all collaborated on a studio album track (not including the compilation album track “BedRock”) and also the first collaboration between Drake and Chris Brown since their altercation in 2012. Chris recorded an unofficial verse for the track during a radio freestyle a week after its official release.

Title: Why So Lonely
About: The last promotional title track from Wonder Girls, ‘Why So Lonely’ features two other tracks and is composed and written by the Wonder Girls themselves, along with a team of professionals perfecting the album. Released in 2016, the song went up the MelOn Chart and garnered positive reaction from critics, as well as winning a Gaon chart bonsang post-disbandment. It is a song that talks about love that is purely lacking from the man, wherein the woman in love is frustrated about his actions that are pretty lacklustre.

Title: 삼각김밥 사용법 (How To Use Triangular Kimbap)!
12월의 기적 (Miracles In December)!
About:
The title song “Miracles in December” is a pop ballad song highlighted by the minimal and emotional piano melodies and beautiful string sounds, giving another emotion of EXO who had caught your eyes with the differentiated dynamic performances until now.
The lyrics say in a heartrending and tragically appealing tone that due to an irresistible yearning for lover after their breakup, one earns almightiness to hear and see his beloved one and he can fill the world with her even though she is not with him anymore, but he finally realizes he could not make her actually come back even with those almightinesses.
This song was written by a hit songwriter Yoon Sarah, arranged by a hot music composer DON SPIKE and then completed the recording work of sessions at the ‘Ocean Way Nashville Studios’ in Tennessee, America, which has high reputation of the best orchestra recoding room in the world, to add to song’s perfection

Title: Second Chance
About:
“Second Chance” is the 2nd single from the Sound of Madness album.
The song was apparently the most popular on the album, receiving three platinum discs and one gold, as well as extremely high positions on peak charts.
Shinedown’s lead singer Brent Smith told the audience at Pointfest 22 about the meaning of “Second Chance,” saying:
It’s important for you to hear this… When I grew up, everyone was okay with being in a bubble. They were cool in their circle. That’s fine. But no one should discourage someone if they have a dream, if they want something more […] This song was difficult for me to write the lyrics to because it’s about my mother and father, and about the day I said goodbye to them, because I had to go try and I’m still trying every day to become a man. So, this song is about that. It’s about the moment you wake up and you decide you want to go for every single dream you ever want.

Title: Love Love Love
About: “Love Love Love” was originally performed by Of Monsters and Men when the band won the Músíktilraunir, an annual music competition in Iceland. The event took place in the Reykjavík Art Museum (Hafnarhúsið) on 27 March, 2010. The song was later reworked and included in the group’s debut album, My Head Is An Animal.

Title: She’s in Love!
Singer: Original Broadway Cast of The Little Mermaid
About: In “She’s in Love,” Ariel’s mersisters and Flounder point out her recent strange behavior and conclude she is in love, though only Flounder knows Ariel is in love with a human.

Title: AKMU - RE-BYE (Romanized)!
About: 사춘기 상 (思春記 上) (Spring)

Title: AKMU - 밤 끝없는 밤 (Endless Dream, Good Night) (English Translation)!
월급은 통장을 스칠 뿐 (Vanishing Paycheck)!
About:
The song “월급은 통장을 스칠 뿐” (Vanishing Paycheck) by Stella Jang reflects on the fleeting nature of money and the singer’s longing for a loved one amidst financial struggles.
In the chorus, the lyrics express the singer’s anticipation and excitement for the day they get to see their loved one, stating that their paycheck, which quickly disappears, fills their poor heart with joy. This highlights the idea that material wealth might be temporary, but the connection with their loved one brings true happiness.
Overall, “월급은 통장을 스칠 뿐” delves into the transience of money and the enduring value of love and human connection. It emphasizes the importance of cherishing relationships over material wealth, as they bring a sense of fulfillment and happiness that money can’t provide.
(Bio Referenced From songtell)
